title: Principal AI Operations Engineer | GRC and AI Specialist
summary: Senior Risk Professional working in Governance, Risk, and Compliance for years within the financial sector with a specialty in information security and privacy. Most of this work has involved assessing risk and developing controls to mitigate it as well as conducting independent testing to demonstrate the effectiveness of GRC efforts to both internal and external stakeholders. I am also a developer with extensive experience in building automation to improve compliance efforts, including building compliance-specific Model Context Protocol servers to improve model performance and automated AI-based assessments of key controls.
